subject: A large blue-purple crab with gold-spotted shell raises its claws near a waterfall
description: A large crab dominates the frame, its shell a deep blue-purple color with scattered gold or amber spots. The crab has prominent claws — one raised and open, the other lower. Fine antennae are visible at the head. The crab rests on a wet, rocky surface with water flowing or misting around it. In the background, a tall waterfall pours down a rocky cliff face, and warm golden light enters from the upper left, possibly sunrise or late afternoon sun. The scene is partially submerged or coastal, with blue-toned water and stone surfaces. No humanoid figures are present.
foreground: Large blue-purple spotted crab with raised claws on wet rock
background: Waterfall, rocky cliff, warm golden light from upper left
emotion: No humanoid expression; the crab's raised claws suggest a defensive or alert posture
